# Haris Josin Peter's Portfolio

> Site Reliability & Backend Engineer specializing in Python, Django, Go, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes.

## About
Site Reliability and cloud-focused backend engineer with hands-on experience managing production-grade, containerized microservices in a product-based ERP environment. Experienced in incident handling, performance optimization, observability engineering, CI/CD automation, and infrastructure monitoring.

## Projects
- LawLens AI: Document Evaluation using RAG + LLMs (Winner - BeachHack Season 6)
- Orinio: Decentralized Academic Review System with Blockchain and AI
- SoulSync: AI-Assisted Reminiscence Tool
- Chaathan The Last Ritual: Real-time Multiplayer Social Deduction Game
- AI Safety Web3 Platform: Community-driven AI Safety Solution on Polygon
